Home / Services / Shingle Repair

Shingle Repair

Precision repairs to extend your roof's life between replacements.

Even minor shingle damage can lead to major leaks in Boston's driving rains. Heritage Roof Masters provides meticulous repairs that blend seamlessly with your existing roof, whether it's a Charlestown colonial or a modern Quincy home.

We carry hundreds of shingle varieties to match Boston's diverse housing stock - from three-tab asphalt on Dorchester triple-deckers to premium architectural shingles on Newton estates. Our color-matching process ensures repairs disappear visually while performing like new.

Each repair addresses the root cause: we reinforce underlying decking if we find soft spots, replace corroded flashing when working near the coast, and upgrade fasteners in wind-prone areas. Temporary patches aren't in our vocabulary - we fix it right the first time.

For historic districts like Back Bay or Cambridge's Victorian neighborhoods, we're skilled at discreet repairs that maintain architectural authenticity. Our techniques preserve original materials whenever possible while ensuring watertight performance.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Damage assessment with cause analysis
  2. 02 Step 2: Material matching from our extensive inventory
  3. 03 Step 3: Structural reinforcement if needed
  4. 04 Step 4: Precision repair with proper sealing and flashing

Benefits

  • Exact material matches
  • Structural assessments included
  • Historic district compliant
  • 5-year repair warranty

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you match my older shingles?

We maintain one of the largest shingle libraries in Massachusetts, with discontinued patterns specifically for Boston's housing stock. If we can't match perfectly, we'll recommend blending strategies.

How long do shingle repairs last?

Our repairs typically last the remaining life of your roof when done properly. We warranty all workmanship for 5 years regardless of material age.

Do you repair slate and tile roofs too?

Yes, we're specialists in historic materials. For Cambridge's Victorian homes and Brookline's Tudor revivals, we use traditional techniques with modern sealants for lasting repairs.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with shingle repair? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: (617) 555-0612
